## 1. Overview

HEXA-IR is a typed, SSA-form intermediate representation designed from n=6 arithmetic.
Unlike LLVM IR's ~1000 opcodes, HEXA-IR uses exactly **J‚ÇÇ=24 instructions** organized
into **œÑ=4 categories** of **n=6 instructions each**.
